refnamediv.refpurpose: Tests if a geometry is empty.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Returns true if this Geometry is an empty geometry. If true, then this Geometry represents an empty geometry collection, polygon, point etc.

note.para: SQL-MM defines the result of ST_IsEmpty(NULL) to be 0, while PostGIS returns NULL.

warning.para: Changed: 2.0.0 In prior versions of PostGIS ST_GeomFromText('GEOMETRYCOLLECTION(EMPTY)') was allowed. This is now illegal in PostGIS 2.0.0 to better conform with SQL/MM standards

refsection.title: Examples
refsection.programlisting:
SELECT ST_IsEmpty(ST_GeomFromText('GEOMETRYCOLLECTION EMPTY')); st_isempty ------------ t (1 row)
SELECT ST_IsEmpty(ST_GeomFromText('POLYGON EMPTY')); st_isempty ------------ t (1 row)
SELECT ST_IsEmpty(ST_GeomFromText('POLYGON((1 2, 3 4, 5 6, 1 2))'));
st_isempty ------------ f (1 row)
SELECT ST_IsEmpty(ST_GeomFromText('POLYGON((1 2, 3 4, 5 6, 1 2))')) = false; ?column? ---------- t (1 row)
SELECT ST_IsEmpty(ST_GeomFromText('CIRCULARSTRING EMPTY')); st_isempty ------------ t (1 row)
